name: Apttus Corp.
lede: Apttus runs four centers across four Indian cities. Chennai, Ahmedabad, Bengaluru and Pune, covering R&D and engineering & design, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Apttus office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Apttus Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Apttus runs 4 verified centers across 4 Indian cities (Chennai, Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Pune), covering R&D and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Apttus's India footprint covers Chennai, Ahmedabad, Bengaluru and Pune, spanning R&D and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all four decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Apttus operate in India?
faq.a: Apttus operates 4 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Apttus have centers in?
faq.a: Apttus's India footprint includes Chennai and 3 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Apttus run in India?
faq.a: Apttus runs R&D and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Apttus's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Apttus's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Apttus's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Apttus's India centers, across HR and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
